mapper.select: SELECT id, asset_no, asset_name, category_id, department_id, user_id, purchase_date, location, status, remark, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM asset WHERE asset_no = #{assetNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset ( asset_no, asset_name, category_id, department_id, user_id, purchase_date, location, status, remark ) VALUES ( #{assetNo}, #{assetName}, #{categoryId}, #{departmentId}, #{userId}, #{purchaseDate}, #{location}, #{status}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, asset_no, asset_name, category_id, department_id, user_id, purchase_date, location, status, remark, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM asset WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.asset_no, a.asset_name, a.category_id, ac.category_name, a.department_id, d.dept_name, a.user_id, u.real_name AS user_real_name, a.purchase_date, a.location, a.status, a.remark, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM asset a LEFT JOIN asset_category ac ON a.category_id = ac.id AND ac.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN department d ON a.department_id = d.id AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE asset SET asset_no = #{assetNo}, asset_name = #{assetName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, user_id = #{userId}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, location = #{location}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE asset SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
